title: ITI publishes Normative Instruction incorporating post-quantum algorithms into ICP-Brasil
description: ITI announcement that Normative Instruction No. 35 (30 Jan 2026) adds post-quantum cryptographic algorithms (PQC) to ICP-Brasil services and to the advanced signature on the GOV.BR platform.

title: Normative Instruction ITI No. 35/2026 - DOC-ICP-01.01 (Standards and Cryptographic Algorithms of ICP-Brasil, PQC)
description: Full text of ITI Normative Instruction 35/2026 in the official ITI repository, establishing post-quantum cryptographic algorithms (e.g. ML-DSA per FIPS 204), key sizes and signature suites for ICP-Brasil.

title: Standards and Cryptographic Algorithms of ICP-Brasil (DOC-ICP-01.01 v4.2)
description: ITI technical standard document setting the cryptographic standards and algorithms required for Brazil's Public Key Infrastructure (ICP-Brasil).

title: Instrucoes Normativas (ITI legislation index)
description: ITI index page listing normative instructions.

title: ITI announces advances in the Electronic Signatures Solution
description: ITI note on advances in the GOV.BR advanced electronic signature solution, including plans to apply first advanced signatures using post-quantum algorithms in H1 2026.

title: Secretary's visit to ITI aims at implementing quantum algorithms in the public key system
description: ITI announcement (Jan 2024) on a partnership with the Secretariat of Technological Development to evaluate post-quantum algorithms and their impact on electronic signatures.

title: ABIN launches cryptography with post-quantum algorithms for the elections
description: Brazilian Intelligence Agency (ABIN) announcement that its libharpia cryptographic library with post-quantum algorithms, developed by Cepesc, will be used in the elections.

title: ABIN presents Intelligence Challenges for 2026
description: ABIN note highlighting the transition to post-quantum cryptography as one of the intelligence challenges for 2026.

title: OSIC 15/2024 - Information and Cybersecurity Guidance (emerging technologies)
description: GSI Information and Cybersecurity Guidance (OSIC 15/2024) covering emerging technologies including quantum computing and post-quantum cryptography, with recommendations to plan PQC migration.

title: OSIC 15/24 (PDF)
description: PDF of GSI OSIC 15/2024 guidance on emerging technologies, including a section on quantum computing and post-quantum cryptography.

title: Panorama of regulation of emerging technologies (GSI webinar presentation)
description: GSI webinar presentation on regulation of emerging technologies addressing AI, IoT, 5G/6G, cloud, quantum computing and post-quantum cryptography.

title: Quantum computing requires strategic preparation to protect digital systems
description: SERPRO (federal data-processing service) article stating it already performs evaluations and tests with post-quantum cryptography algorithms and calls for strategic PQC migration planning.

title: Anatel and IME advance dialogue on national quantum communication infrastructure
description: Anatel (national telecom regulator) note on the Rede Quandanga project with IME, an experimental quantum communication network covering quantum cryptography and post-quantum cryptography.

title: Central Bank, Brazil Quantum and Microsoft explore post-quantum cryptography for Pix (with Fenasbac support)
description: Study by the Central Bank of Brazil with Brazil Quantum and Microsoft on feasibility of post-quantum cryptography algorithms in the Pix instant payment system. Published on a Microsoft (vendor) site.

title: BC studies regulation for AI and quantum cryptography
description: Journalism (Finsiders) reporting that the Central Bank of Brazil is studying regulation for AI and quantum cryptography.

title: Quantum technologies can revolutionise computing, cryptography and sensors (MCTI)
description: Ministry of Science, Technology and Innovation (MCTI) note on quantum technologies for computing, communication and sensing; focused on quantum tech generally rather than PQC migration.

title: Cancelled debate on challenges and perspectives of quantum computing in Brazil (Chamber of Deputies)
description: Chamber of Deputies news on a cancelled debate about quantum computing; general quantum computing, no explicit PQC reference.

title: QuantumTec advances with its own language for quantum chips (CBPF)
description: Brazilian Centre for Physics Research (CBPF) note on quantum chips; quantum hardware research, not PQC.

title: Brasil Ciberseguro 2025 programme (GSI)
description: GSI event programme for Brasil Ciberseguro 2025.

title: GSI-BID event programme (SSIC)
description: GSI event programme document referencing post-quantum cryptography among topics.

title: Discover Post-Quantum Cryptography (Prodesp)
description: Prodesp (Sao Paulo state IT company) explainer page on post-quantum cryptography. Sub-national state-owned enterprise, marketing/explainer in nature.
